title: Loop Document Metadata
description: Validates the structured frontmatter metadata for an agent-loop document.

schema_version.description: Version of the loop metadata schema.

loop_id.description: Canonical loop identifier used as the Markdown filename.

status.description: Current workflow state of the loop.

execution_mode.description: Whether the loop targets a business repository, the control repository, or documentation only.

business_repo.description: Business repository in OWNER/REPO form, or null for control-only loops.

business_base_branch.description: Base branch for business repository changes, or null when not applicable.

work_branch.description: Branch that the executor should use for work.

human_approval_required.description: Whether a human must approve the loop before execution.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the loop was created.

max_retry_count.description: Maximum number of execution retries before escalation.
